title: Product Compression Closure Review

issue_classifications.title: [Review]: Reassess whether product-compression intent in #230 is satisfied
issue_classifications.evidence: This review compares the completed compression slices and records the closure decision for #230.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Strip away visible product residue that is no longer earning its keep
issue_classifications.evidence: #352-#354, #371-#374 materially reduced default visible product shape while preserving startup, weak-agent compatibility, generated-adapter trust, review authoring, and lifecycle safety.

goal: Decide whether #230 is honestly satisfied after the product-compression slices landed.
non_goals: Do not use this generated skeleton as proof that review work is complete.

review_mode.review question: Is the visible product shape materially smaller, clearer, and easier to enter without losing leverage?

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; gh issue list --state open; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json.
review_method.evidence sources: closeout reviews for #371, #372, #373, #374; generated adapter outputs; lifecycle dry-run JSON; current open issue state

findings.title: #230 is satisfied enough to close
findings.evidence: First-contact adapters now route through AGENTS.md/start instead of duplicating doctrine; generated adapter status is checkable; review records have a valid-by-construction command; lifecycle dry-runs expose lifecycle_plan; default report/startup paths remain compact and review artifacts are evidence, not operating input.
findings.notes: Remaining future product-shape work should be opened as new, narrower issues with fresh evidence rather than keeping #230 open as a broad subtraction umbrella.

findings.title: Remaining visible surfaces earn their cost
findings.evidence: AGENTS.md is a thin startup adapter; llms/tools adapters are generated compatibility surfaces; contracts remain machinery behind checks/queries; reviews are historical evidence; planning state is compact and empty after archive.
findings.notes: The current shape preserves weak-agent compatibility and recovery while lowering ordinary first-contact burden.

recommendation.dismiss: do not keep #230 open as a generic compression bucket

retention.closeout shape: shrink or archive after findings are routed
retention.proof surface: this review record plus routed follow-up residue
